The problem

We are more connected
than ever, and lonelier.

Average daily screen time
 7h 4m
73%
of Gen Z report feeling lonely most of the time — the highest of any generation ever recorded.
8 sec
The average human attention span in 2024. Down from 12 seconds in 2000. Goldfish have 9.
40%
of college students say social media makes their anxiety and depression significantly worse.
Mingle
is the antidote. Real events. Real people. Real friendships — built offline, without an algorithm deciding who you meet.
How it works

From zero to social
in four steps.

01
🗺

Discover events

Browse curated events near you — trivia nights, workshops, outdoor adventures and more. Filter by vibe, size, or activity type.

02
🎭

Choose your mode

Solo explorer, group member, partner duo, or full surprise. Mingle adapts to your comfort level — no pressure, ever.

03
⚡

Show up & spark

Hosts facilitate natural icebreakers and activities that make conversation effortless. Just show up — we handle the awkward part.

04
🌱

Leave with more

Walk out with new friends, phone numbers, and plans. The connection starts offline — the app just helps you keep it going.

Participation modes

Your comfort. Your rules.

Designed for every personality — from the nervous first-timer to the seasoned social butterfly.

✦ Most popular
👥

Join a group

Get placed in a small group of 4–6 people for the entire event. You'll tackle activities together, share laughs, and naturally bond over shared experiences — the easiest way to make multiple friends at once.

4–6 peopleGuided activitiesLow pressure
🙋

Solo explorer

Arrive alone and get rotated through different groups and activities all evening. The fastest way to meet the most people — for the adventurous type who's ready to dive in.

High varietyMax connectionsSpontaneous
🤝

Partner up

Bring one friend along as your anchor. You'll still meet plenty of new people through structured activities, but always have a familiar face when you need it.

Bring a buddyComfortableShared memories
🎲

Surprise me

Can't decide? Let Mingle choose your mode on the night. Sometimes the most unexpected arrangement leads to the most unforgettable friendships.

Fully randomMaximum funStory-worthy

The app experience

Built to get you
off it.

Mingle's app is designed to be used for minutes, not hours. Find your event, confirm your mode, show up. That's it.

🗺

Hyperlocal discovery

Events shown within your exact neighborhood, ranked by fit for your personality and past activity types.

🎯

One-tap RSVP

No lengthy profiles. No questionnaires. See event, tap confirm, show up. The friction-free onboarding you deserve.

🔒

Privacy by default

No public feed. No follower counts. No performance. Just you, the event, and the people you'll actually meet in person.

💬

Post-event nudges

Opt-in contact exchange after events. We'll remind you to follow up 24 hours later — because intentions fade fast.

Proof that it actually works.

Meet the founders

Built by people who felt the problem.

Mingle was born from a dorm room conversation between four friends who realized they were spending more time on their phones than with each other. We decided to build the antidote.

Co-Founder & CEO
Aarjav
Entrepreneur & Tech Strategy

Serial entrepreneur with a vision to reshape how a generation socializes. Aarjav drives Mingle's product strategy and leads the charge on growth, partnerships, and the big picture thinking that makes this more than just an app.

in 𝕏

Areen
Full-Stack Developer & Tech Lead

A programming prodigy who started coding at 13, Areen architects and builds every pixel of Mingle's platform. His full-stack mastery and obsessive attention to technical detail is why the product feels as good as it does.

The engine that keeps Mingle running. Ashish manages the on-ground logistics of every event, builds the operational systems behind the scenes, and ensures every single Mingle experience is seamlessly executed and genuinely memorable.

FAQ

Questions we always get.

Everything you need to know before your first Mingle event.

Is Mingle a dating app?
+
Not at all. Mingle is a social connection platform — the goal is to help you make genuine friends, expand your social circle, and improve your real-world social skills. Romantic connections can happen naturally in real life (as they always have), but they are not the product.
Do I need to come with someone?
+
Absolutely not — in fact, most of our attendees come solo. Our "Solo Explorer" and "Join a Group" modes are specifically designed for people arriving alone. Our hosts are trained to make solo attendees feel immediately comfortable and included.
What kind of activities happen at events?
+
Events range from trivia nights, cooking workshops, and art sessions to hiking groups, improv comedy, philosophy salons, and board game nights. All activities are designed to naturally spark conversation — you focus on the game, and the connections happen on their own.
How much does it cost to attend?
+
Joining Mingle is completely free. Individual events may have a small cover charge (typically ₹200–500) to cover venue and materials costs. Some events are fully free. All pricing is clearly shown before you RSVP — no hidden surprises.
I have social anxiety. Is Mingle still for me?
+
Especially for you. Mingle events are specifically structured so that you're never put on the spot individually. Activities give you something to focus on, groups give you built-in belonging, and our hosts are trained to notice and support anxious first-timers. Many of our biggest advocates are self-described introverts.
Can my college/institution partner with Mingle?
+
Yes! We have a dedicated campus program where we partner with student unions, colleges, and universities to co-host Mingle events. We provide the structure, training, and platform — your institution provides the space. Reach out to us at campus@mingle.in to get started.
How do I share contacts after an event?
+
We keep it intentional. After an event, attendees who both opt in can exchange contact details via the app. No one gets your number without your consent. We'll also send a gentle nudge 24 hours after the event to remind you to follow up — because good intentions fade fast.
How can I host a Mingle event?
+
Anyone can apply to be a Mingle host. We provide full training, a proven event format library, and ongoing support. Hosts earn a percentage of event revenue and get early access to new features. Apply through the "Host an Event" button — we review all applications within 48 hours.
